# Gina Gonzalez Notary

## About
Gina Gonzalez is a certified mobile notary public and wedding officiant serving Sacramento, California and surrounding areas. She is NNA certified, bilingual in English and Spanish, and has over 10 years of experience with 6,000+ documents notarized. She holds a legal background from law school in Peru.

## Services
- Mobile Notary Public: https://ginagonzaleznotary.com/notary-services/mobile-notary-sacramento/
- Real Estate & Loan Signings: https://ginagonzaleznotary.com/notary-services/real-estate-notary-sacramento/
- Legal & Personal Documents: https://ginagonzaleznotary.com/notary-services/legal-personal/
- Court & Legal Proceedings: https://ginagonzaleznotary.com/notary-services/court-legal-proceedings/
- Wedding Officiant: https://ginagonzaleznotary.com/notary-services/wedding-officiant-services/
- Apostille Services: https://ginagonzaleznotary.com/notary-services/apostille-services-in-sacramento-ca/
- Spanish Notary Services: https://ginagonzaleznotary.com/notary-services/spanish-notary-sacramento/
- Certified English/Spanish Translation: https://ginagonzaleznotary.com/notary-services/certified-english-spanish-translation-services/
- Power of Attorney: https://ginagonzaleznotary.com/notary-services/power-of-attorney-notary-sacramento/
- Prenuptial Agreement Notary: https://ginagonzaleznotary.com/notary-services/prenuptial-agreement-notary-sacramento/
- Loan Signing Agent: https://ginagonzaleznotary.com/notary-services/loan-signing-agent-sacramento/
- Name Change Notary: https://ginagonzaleznotary.com/notary-services/name-change-notary-sacramento/
- DMV Document Notary: https://ginagonzaleznotary.com/notary-services/dmv-document-notary-sacramento/
- Restraining Order Notary: https://ginagonzaleznotary.com/notary-services/restraining-order-notary-sacramento/

## Service Areas
Sacramento, West Sacramento, Elk Grove, Roseville, Folsom, Rancho Cordova, Citrus Heights, Davis, Woodland, Lincoln, Auburn, Carmichael, Fair Oaks, Orangevale, Natomas

## Credentials
- NNA (National Notary Association) Certified
- Insured Mobile Notary
- Former Attorney (Law School in Peru)
- 10+ years professional experience
- 6,000+ documents notarized
- 100% client satisfaction rate
- Bilingual: English and Spanish
